Instruction: Walk straight ahead along the sidewalk, keeping the long white construction fence on your left and the street on your right. Continue following this path past the trees lining the sidewalk until the fence ends and you reach a large intersection. Cross the wide street using the crosswalk. Once you reach the other side, continue straight along the sidewalk, keeping the tall building on your left. Walk past the cafe with the "A TWOSOME PLACE" sign and the adjacent storefront with a bright red sign. Stop when you arrive in front of the large, bright blue storefront with a "DAVICH" sign and a sun-like logo on your left. You have reached your destination.
